text: Ne edze ƒoƒo ɖe edzi la, ate ŋu atso amea ƒe nuɖuɖu kple ami ƒe ƒuƒoƒo gbɔ.
ref: When it starts to build up, it may be caused by the person's diet and fat accumulation.
translated: If it starts to build up, it can be caused by a combination of the person’s diet and fat.

text: Le ƒe 1964 me la, Nkrumah yi Dukɔwo Ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ Ðoɖo Ƒe Adre Na Dukɔwo Ƒe Xɔtudɔ Kple Dɔwɔwɔ Ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ Ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ Ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ Ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ Ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ me, eye wògblɔ be suku vevitɔ si wɔa dɔ le ŋgɔ tsɔ wɔwɔm la gbɔ eye wòbia be woakeke suku bubuwo ɖe edzi.
ref: In 1964, Nkrumah brought forth the Seven Year Development Plan for National Reconstruction and Development, which identified education as a key source of development and called for the expansion of secondary technical schools.
translated: In 1964, Nkrumah went to the launch of the Seven-Year National Action Plan for National Building and Construction, stating that the main front-line school had been reached and calling for the expansion of other schools.

text: Tsãtɔa nyea agbanɔamedzinɔla nenema ke le afisiafi si wotsɔe da ɖe sinimaɖeɖe me - (eɖanye nugbugbɔgbugbɔ, gbɔdɔdɔ, awu ɖeɖe le eƒe awudzraɖoƒe alo nu bubu aɖe si le abe ema ene o.) Ema hã eye wòna wonyae nyuie le sinimawɔƒewo.
ref: The former used to be equally obliging wherever she was placed in filming - (whether kissing, having sex, undressing in her wardrobe or something else like that.) That too and made him well known in the film industry.
translated: The former is equally liable wherever he is cast on film - (be it kissing, having sex, taking clothes out of his wardrobe or something like that.) That too and made him well known in the film industry.

text: Nyateƒee, ga nye nusi ame sia ame hiã le eƒe agbe me be wòate ŋu aɖɔ nuwo ɖo.
ref: Of course, money is something that everyone needs in their life in order to make things right.
translated: Of course, money is something everyone needs in their life to make things right.

text: Ame aɖewo hã yɔnɛ be Tanogbe.
ref: Some also call it the Tano language.
translated: Some people also call it Tano language.

text: Agbledela geɖewo adze le wo ɖokuiwo si to ɖeɖefia sia dzi.
ref: More agriculturalists will get exposure through this exhibition.
translated: Many farmers will be automatically exposed by this exhibition.

text: Nuƒoƒo tẽ ƒe habɔbɔ siwo le sukuwo fia nu sukuviwo tso ƒewuiwo ƒe ɣeyiɣia ŋu.
ref: Straight talk clubs in schools have educated students about the adolescent stage.
translated: Direct speech clubs in schools teach students about the adolescent period.

text: Azɔ hã, ne xewo va le nu gblẽm le agblea ŋu to nukuwo ɖeɖe me la, vɔvɔ̃donu aɖe dada ɖe afima ado vɔvɔ̃ na wo.
ref: Also, when birds take to disturbing the farm by uprooting the crops, putting a scarecrow there will scare them away.
translated: Also, if birds are starting to damage the field by picking crops, placing a scarecrow will scare them away.

text: Zi geɖe la, amedzro siwo va srãa wo kpɔ la kpɔa dzidzɔ ne woyi teƒe yeyewo hena fefe siwo wowɔna le duta. Ele be bɔlƒoha la natu amedzrodzeƒe siwo ame siwo doa vivi ɖe bɔlƒoƒo ŋu anɔ.
ref: Visiting fans usually have fun when they go to new places for away games. The football club should build hotels where the fans can stay.
translated: Visiting guests are often excited to go to new places for away shows. The football team needs to build hotels for fans.

text: Amesiwo dze egɔme hã doa alɔ ŋgɔyiyi ƒe ɖoɖo siwo wowɔna le woƒe nutoawo me la ƒã.
ref: The initiators also barely support the development programs in their communities.
translated: The initiators also rarely support development initiatives in their communities.

text: Akɔntabubu le vevie ŋutɔ le dɔwɔƒe.
ref: Accountability is so important in a work place.
translated: Accountability is very important in the workplace.

text: Kpovitɔwo ɖe gbeƒã hã be woaxe fetu si nye GHC2,000.00 na amesiame si ateŋu akpeɖe wo ŋu be woanya susu si tututu ta wòwɔe nenema, si na wolée.
ref: Police have also announced a reward of GHC2,000.00 for anyone who can help them find out the exact reason why he did that, that has caused his arrest.
translated: Police have also announced a reward of GHC2,000.00 for anyone who can help them ascertain the exact motive, leading to his arrest.

text: Aʋawɔwɔ le anyigba ta gakpɔtɔ le amewo dome le kɔƒenutowo me.
ref: There are still land conflicts among people in the rural areas.
translated: There is still fighting over land in rural areas.

text: Dziɖuɖua mena ga be woatu mɔ aɖewo le nuto aɖewo me o.
ref: The government does not allocate funds to construct some roads in some areas.
translated: The government did not provide funds to build some roads in some areas.

text: Ele be nutome la naxɔ senyalawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe be wòafia mɔ wo le senyawo me.
ref: The district should recruit a legal team to guide them in legal processes.
translated: The district should hire a legal team to guide them through the legal process.

text: Le ŋkeke ʋee siwo va yi me la, elektrikŋusẽ do go kuxi siwo wɔe be amesiwo di be yewoaƒle akaɖiwo mete ŋu kpɔ ɖeka o.
ref: In the past few days electricity has been facing problems that have prevented those who want to buy lights from getting one.
translated: In the past few days, electricity has faced problems that have prevented prospective buyers of lights from getting one.

text: Enye fefe dodzidzɔname aɖe. Ha siwo wodzina le fefea me la dometɔ aɖewoe nye "Pempenaa, Nanaa!Kpɔ, kpɔ, kpɔ, kpɔ dada koo...". Woƒonɛ zi geɖe le ŋdɔ me.
ref: It is an interesting game. Some of the songs sing during the game is in session is "Pempenaa, Nanaa!See, see, see, see dada koo...". It is mostly played in the afternoon
translated: It was an interesting game. Songs in the game include "Pempenaa, Nanaa!Look, look, look, just look at my mother...". It is often played in the afternoon.

text: Kplɔla siwo tso Nadowli-Kaleo Nutome, Bulisa, Jirapa Dudzikpɔha, kple Talensi Nutome ƒo ƒu lɔ̃ be yewoawɔ dɔ abe ƒuƒoƒo ene.
ref: The leaders from Nadowli-Kaleo District, Bulisa, Jirapa Municipal Assembly, and Talensi District together agreed to work as a team.
translated: Leaders from Nadowli-Kaleo District, Bulisa, Jirapa Municipality, and Talensi District collectively agreed to work as a team.

text: Coronavirus dɔvɔ̃a gblẽ nu le dukɔ bliboa ŋu vevie eye dukɔ bliboa awɔ aʋa kple coronavirus dɔvɔ̃a le míaƒe dua me.
ref: The whole country is highly affected by the coronavirus pandemic and there will be a national fight against the coronavirus pandemic in our town.
translated: The entire country has been hit hard by the coronavirus pandemic and the entire nation will fight the coronavirus epidemic in our city.

text: Ŋutsuawo nedzi hadzidzi, Eye nyɔnuwo nenɔ ɣe ɖum.
ref: Let the men do the singing, and the women do the dancing.
translated: Let the men sing, And let the women dance.

text: Anyigba ŋuti nyaʋiʋliawo na amewo bu amewo ƒe agbe kple nunɔamesiwo le Agona Swedru
ref: The land disputes resulted in loss of lives and properties in Agona Swedru
translated: The land disputes have resulted in loss of life and property in Agona Swedru

text: Nkyinkyim nye nyakpakpa aɖe si le Fantetɔwo ƒe ŋutinyawo me si le abe nuwɔwɔ si ƒe nɔnɔme le abe zigzag ene. Woxɔe se be ekpɔa teƒe kɔkɔewo ta eye be ekpɔa ame ta le gbɔgbɔ me.
ref: Nkyinkyim is a mythical creature in Fante folklore that takes the form of a twisted, zigzag-shaped creature. It is believed to guard sacred places and is associated with spiritual protection.
translated: Nkyinkyim is a mythical figure in Fante folklore that looks like a zigzag-shaped creature. It is believed to protect holy places and to provide spiritual protection.

text: Vevienyenye aɖewoe nye, ekpena ɖe mía ŋu míenya alesi xexeame le zɔzɔm, ekpena ɖe mía ŋu míeɖoa dze kple dukɔ vovovowo, enaa míekpɔa dzidzɔ kple bubuawo.
ref: some of the importance are, it helps us to know how the world is moving, it helps us to communicate with different peoples, makes us happy and so on.
translated: Some of the importance are, it helps us to know how the world is moving, it helps us to communicate with different countries, it makes us happy and so on.

text: Dziɖuɖudɔwɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ gblɔ le kpekpe aɖe si wowɔ tsɔ dzro fetu dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ ƒe aɖaŋuɖoɖoa me be yewole te sesĩe.
ref: The Association of Government Workers stated at a meeting held to discuss the salary increment proposal that they firmly stand their ground.
translated: The Government Employees Union said at a meeting to discuss the salary increase proposal that it stands firm.

text: Nutomea ƒe ŋgɔnɔla xɔ dzɔla yeye ɖe dɔ me le asi me.
ref: The district leader has employed a new watchman in the market.
translated: The district leader employed a new guard at the market.

text: Ele be míana xɔseha siwo le nutoa me nakpɔ gome le sɔhɛwo ƒe gbɔdɔdɔ ŋuti nufiafia me.
ref: We should involve the local faith communities to educate the youth about sex education.
translated: We need to involve local faith communities in youth sexuality education.

text: Azɔ hã, ele tsi ɖevia, dzraa eŋu ɖo eye wònɔa fofoa ƒe ƒometɔwo lalam.
ref: Also, she baths the child, dressed and wait for the family of the father.
translated: She also bathes the child, cleans him, and waits for his father's relatives.

text: Woadzro dɔléle sia ƒe afɔkuwo me eye woakpɔ egbɔe.
ref: The dangers of this disease will be assessed and remedies will be provided.
translated: Risk factors for this disease will be discussed and managed.

text: Nu gbegblẽ wɔwɔ dometɔ ɖekae nye ale si amewo wɔa nu vlo wɔwɔ le míaƒe hatsotsowo me tɔwo nye be womehea nu gbegblẽ vɛ o.
ref: One of the causes of crime in our communities is poor upbringing.
translated: One of the negative aspects of how people commit crimes in our classes is that they do not cause negative effects.

text: Kɔnu sia bia be woatsɔ anyi dzĩ (Akpade) atre ʋɔtru eve siwo le eƒe axawo dzi le Fiɖa si nye Twins Yam Ŋkekenyui dzi.
ref: This rite involves plastering two side doors with red clay (Akpade) on the Friday of the Twins Yam Festival.
translated: This ritual involves sealing the two doors on its sides with red clay (Akpade) on the Friday of the Twins Yam Festival.

text: Nublanuinya aɖe dzɔ ɖe nyɔnu aɖe si xɔ ƒe wuiatɔ̃ (15) dzi le Konongo le Ashanti nutoa me.
ref: A sad thing has happened to a lady of the age fifteen (15) in Konongo in the Ashanti region.
translated: A tragedy struck a fifteen (15) year old woman in Konongo in the Ashanti region.

text: Ele be woanɔ dɔnɔ siwo le nɔnɔme sesẽ aɖe me la ƒe nɔnɔme nyuitɔ me nanɔ nɔvi siwo le kɔdzi.
ref: Patients in a critical state should be given priority in the hospital.
translated: Patients in a critical condition should be kept in the right position by the brothers in the hospital.

text: Katoliko-ha la ana asigɛ nunɔlawo le Ebola dɔvɔ̃a dome.
ref: The catholic church will provide gloves to the priests amidst the Ebola outbreak.
translated: The Catholic Church will give bracelets to priests amid the Ebola outbreak.

text: Ne ƒomea me tɔ bubu yi anyigbaa dzi la, esia ana woanya be ame aɖe va afima xoxo.
ref: When another family member goes to the land, this will communicate to them that someone has already been there.
translated: If another family member visits the property, this will let them know that someone has already been there.

text: Ghanatɔ asitsala si xɔ ƒe 43 si le UK, Enerst Kwaku Kobeah, na wonya eƒe tameɖoɖo le NDC ƒe aflaga ƒe hoʋiʋli ŋu.
ref: Ghanaian business man aged 43 who lives in UK, Enerst Kwaku Kobeah, has made his intentions about contesting for the NDC flagbeareship known.
translated: A 43-year-old UK-based Ghanaian businessman, Enerst Kwaku Kobeah, has made his intentions on the NDC flagship contest known.

text: Wona tsyɔ̃evi alafa ɖeka blaatɔ̃ susɔeawo le nutoa me, eye woawo hã xɔ sukudɔwɔnuwo kple sukunudidiwo.
ref: One hundred fifty orphans have been given scholarships in the district and they also received scholastic materials and school requirements.
translated: The remaining one hundred and fifty orphans in the county were given school supplies and supplies.

text: Woaɖo ŋku ame siwo le ŋutinya me la dzi le woƒe  akpa si wowɔ na dukɔa ta.
ref: The historicals will be remembered for their contributions towards the country.
translated: People in history will be remembered for their contributions to the country.

text: Ðewohĩ ƒe sia ƒe azãɖuɣi madzɔ dzi na ame abe alesi wònɔna ɖaa ene o elabena wode se ɖe dutoƒo kpekpewo nu
ref: This year's festive season may not be as exciting as usual since public gatherings have been banned
translated: This year’s festive season may not be as exciting as usual as public gatherings are prohibited

text: De ŋugble le nu nyui siwo dzɔ le wò agbe me ŋu, eye nàkpɔ dzidzɔ.
ref: Think a lot about the good things that have happened in your life, and be happy.
translated: Reflect on the positive things in your life, and be happy.

text: Ŋutsuwo kple nyɔnuwo kple hadomeŋgɔyiyi ƒe dziɖuɖumegã tsãtɔ bu si na be hadomeɖoɖoa do kpo nu.
ref: The former minister of gender and social development disappeared which made the partnership fail.
translated: The former minister of gender and social development disappeared leading to the failure of the partnership.

text: Ame sia ame, ame tsitsi alo ɖevi ate ŋu aɖu abɔbɔwo.
ref: Snails can be eaten by anyone, adult or child.
translated: Anyone, adult or child, can eat bananas.

text: Kpovitɔwo ɖe gbeƒãe le radiodɔwɔƒewo be amewo nade dzesi ame kukua, esi wole numekuku wɔm be yewoakpɔ nyi siwo wofi siwo dziɖuɖua na la.
ref: The police announced on radio stations for people to identify the body, as they carry out investigations to recover the stolen cattle provided by the government.
translated: Police issued a radio broadcast asking people to identify the body, as they investigated to recover the stolen government-issued cattle.

text: Wo dometɔ ɖeka ate ŋu awɔ nu vevii eye wòakpɔtɔ anye ame bubuwo tɔ.
ref: One can be disabled and still live a normal life like others.
translated: One of them can hurt and still belong to others.

text: Wodzroa dɔwɔla nyui aɖe le ale si wòtea ŋu wɔa dɔe ta.
ref: A good worker is evaluated on the basis of his or her performance.
translated: A good employee is sought after because of his ability to work.

text: Twigbe gbãtɔ si woŋlɔe nye Akuapem Twi, eye eyae nye gbe gbãtɔ si me woŋlɔ Ŋɔŋlɔ Kɔkɔeawo le Twi me.
ref: The first written language of Twi was Akuapem Twi, and it was the first language in which the Holy Scriptures were written in Twi.
translated: The first written Twi was Akuapem Twi, and it was the first language in which the Holy Scriptures were written in Twi.

text: Ame etɔ̃ bu woƒe luʋɔ le afɔku gã aɖe si dzɔ le Sunyani Techiman mɔ dzi me.
ref: Three people have lost their souls in a fatal accident which occurred at the Sunyani Techiman road.
translated: Three people lost their lives in a major accident on Sunyani Techiman road.

text: Ele be nutome gã dziɖuɖumegãwo naɖe asi le woƒe masɔmasɔwo ŋu eye woawɔ dɔ le mɔawo dzi.
ref: The district officials should put their differences aside and work on the roads.
translated: The provincial authorities should drop their differences and work on the roads.

text: Nye nyinɔwo ƒe akpa gãtɔ dzea dɔ, Woléa ŋku ɖe woƒe lãmesẽ kple woƒe lãmesẽ ŋu.
ref: Most of my cows are diseased, posing a challenge for their proper care and well-being.
translated: Most of my cows get sick, They check their health and fitness.

text: Fififi ƒe seselelãme nɔa esi ale gbegbe be eɖua nu ɖe ​​eme be yeawu fififi la ŋutɔ nu.
ref: He gets a feeling of theft so great that he eats into it to complete the theft itself.
translated: He has such a sense of stealing that he eats into it to finish the theft itself.

text: Tsã la, dziɖuɖua ɖo aʋawɔnu gbogbo aɖewo be woaɖe Polio ɖa le Ghana.
ref: Previously the government organized mass immunization to eliminate Polio from Ghana.
translated: In the past, the government has deployed a number of campaigns to eradicate Polio in Ghana.

text: Viɖe kawoe do tso dekɔnu sia me?
ref: What were the benefits of this culture?
translated: What are the benefits of this culture?
